channel.title: Foxglove Blog
channel.description: Product updates, tutorials, and community stories from Foxglove.

item.title: Autonomous Navigation with LeKiwi and Nav2
item.description: How I added autonomous navigation to my LeKiwi robot with Nav2 — covering LiDAR filtering, mapping with slam_toolbox, localization with AMCL, and configuring Nav2 for a holonomic base, all visualized and controlled from Foxglove.

item.title: Foxglove vs. Foxglove Studio: Two Years On
item.description: Two years after the last open-source Foxglove Studio release, Foxglove has shipped 50+ releases and become a data infrastructure platform for Physical AI. Here is what changed and how to evaluate whether to switch.

item.title: Announcing: Remote Data Loaders
item.description: Remote Data Loaders let enterprise teams connect Foxglove to databases, warehouses, and file storage without migrating data—your service queries the source, emits MCAP, and runs on Kubernetes where your data already lives.

item.title: Announcing: Image Overlays
item.description: Foxglove now supports image overlays in the Image panel — composite masks, heatmaps, and model outputs directly on top of your camera feed, with per-layer opacity and blend mode controls.

item.title: Compressed Point Clouds in Foxglove
item.description: Foxglove now supports a CompressedPointCloud schema — publish Draco-encoded point clouds and visualize them directly in the 3D panel, with all the same features you already use for PointCloud.

item.title: Announcing: Improved Device Timeline
item.description: The device timeline in Foxglove has a new zoom and pan mode, a more flexible date picker, filters, and deep links so you can find the right recordings faster.

item.title: Teleoperating the LeKiwi Robot from a Steam Deck
item.description: Learn how to turn a Steam Deck into a portable all-in-one LeKiwi controller and Foxglove monitoring station using Pixi, Distrobox, and ROS 2.

item.title: Bring Your Own Storage
item.description: Bring Your Own Storage lets enterprises keep raw MCAP data at rest in their own cloud storage while Foxglove manages the compute for indexing, query, and visualization.

item.title: Data Search & Curation
item.description: Search MCAP data at petabyte scale. Curate results as sessions, events, and the training datasets that feed your next model iteration.

item.title: Track device property changes over time in Foxglove
item.description: Foxglove now records a full timeline for device properties—whether you update them in the UI or via the API—so teams can see when metadata changed and what it was before.

item.title: Basic Seats
item.description: Basic Seats let you share data visualization across your team without paying for full developer capabilities - ideal for field ops, executives, and contractors who need access without authoring.

item.title: We're reducing self-service prices for Foxglove
item.description: Self-service pricing now starts lower, with Pro at $20/month for 1 TB storage and 3 Developer Seats, unlimited Basic Seats on paid plans, and new volume discount tiers as usage grows.

item.title: Extension: Bringing photorealistic 3D maps to Foxglove for outdoor robot navigation
item.description: Jion Kubo shares a Foxglove extension that renders photorealistic 3D tiles, fuses ROS 2 robot data in a local ENU frame, and publishes goals and clicked points without leaving the 3D view.

item.title: Connect Foxglove to your local player with PlaybackControl
item.description: Keep your existing data format, control playback from the Foxglove UI, and replay the same run again and again.

item.title: GrandTour: Taking Legged Robotics Into the Wild
item.description: Introducing GrandTour: a large-scale, open-access legged-robotics dataset spanning 49 missions across diverse conditions to accelerate the development and benchmarking of autonomy algorithms.

item.title: Actuate 26: The Developer Conference for People Who Build Robots
item.description: This August, more than 1,000 robotics developers will gather in San Francisco for Actuate 26, our annual conference for the engineers and technical leaders building the next generation of AI for the physical world.

item.title: Announcing Sessions in Foxglove
item.description: Sessions are a new way to organize and analyze device data in Foxglove that maps directly to how robotics developers view and analyze data.

item.title: Depth Image Rendering: PNG Support and RGB Colorization
item.description: Foxglove now supports PNG compressed depth images as 3D point clouds, RGB colorization from sibling images, and custom color modes for depth encodings in the Image panel.

item.title: Get Started with Foxglove: Videos for New Users
item.description: If you're getting started with Foxglove, one of the fastest ways to learn is by opening real data and seeing how the app works in practice.

item.title: Calibrating a monocular camera for the LeKiwi robot using ROS 2
item.description: This article details the process of calibrating a USB webcam for the LeKiwi robot, modifying the standard ROS 2 camera calibration process to run headless without a display, using terminal logging and automatic result saving.

item.title: Announcing Programmatic Layouts in Foxglove
item.description: Define, compose, and reuse Foxglove layouts entirely from code in Notebooks

item.title: Announcing: Tabs for the Foxglove Desktop App
item.description: Work with multiple datasets in a single window instead of juggling separate instances.

item.title: Upgrading the LeKiwi into a LiDAR-equipped explorer
item.description: Upgrading LeKiwi robot with a 2D LiDAR and ROS 2, transforming it into a low-cost open-source autonomous platform

item.title: Turning a VLP‑16 Into a “Spherical” Scanner
item.description: How a secondhand VLP‑16, one extra mechanical axis, and encoder-based deskewing turned into a cave-mapping learning project

item.title: Announcing: Event Types
item.description: Structured annotations for robotics data.

item.title: Extending PX4 support.
item.description: Introducing the Foxglove PX4 extension.

item.title: Announcing: Index-in-place for Self-hosted Sites.
item.description: Index original recordings in your own bucket without duplicating data.

item.title: Robots are eating the world that software could not.
item.description: Announcing our $40M Series B to scale our data platform for Physical AI.

item.title: Jupyter Notebooks integration.
item.description: Visualize your robotics data directly in Notebooks.

item.title: Embed Foxglove using an iframe.
item.description: Foxglove’s data visualizations are now just an <iframe> away.

item.title: Use Cloudini to visualize compressed point clouds in Foxglove.
item.description: Visualize compressed LiDAR and ROS point clouds in Foxglove with the new Cloudini Converter extension

item.title: Announcing: Remote Visualization & Teleoperation (private beta)
item.description: Announcing: Remote Visualization & Teleoperation (private beta)

item.title: Actuate 2025 day 2 recap.
item.description: Physical AI has moved from niche to necessity.

item.title: The announcements from Foxglove at Actuate 2025.
item.description: Building the missing infrastructure layer for Physical AI.

item.title: Actuate 2025 day 1 recap.
item.description: The future of Physical AI is already in motion.

item.title: Message path downselection.
item.description: Building high-performance deserializers to make plots load fast.

item.title: The Foxglove Bridge and Tailscale VPN
item.description: How to set up live telemetry for your ROS system.

item.title: Working with scenes and Pointclouds.
item.description: Working with scenes and Pointclouds.

item.title: Announcing: Layout History and Layout Manager.
item.description: Announcing: Layout History and Layout Manager.

item.title: Announcing: Data Loaders.
item.description: Announcing: Data Loaders.

item.title: Announcing: Maps in the 3D panel.
item.description: Announcing map support in the 3D panel!

item.title: Grids and Voxels: adding the 3rd dimension.
item.description: Grids and Voxels: adding the 3rd dimension.

item.title: Converting the EuRoC MAV Dataset to MCAP and visualizing SLAM using Foxglove.
item.description: Converting the EuRoC MAV Dataset to MCAP and visualizing SLAM using Foxglove.

item.title: Announcing: Seamless, efficient loading of time-range data.
item.description: Streamline your large-scale data analysis and debugging.

item.title: Announcing: Projects.
item.description: Announcing: Projects.

item.title: Announcing: The Audio panel.
item.description: Hear (and see) what your robot hears.

item.description: Comparing ML training using the Foxglove SDK.

item.title: Use the Foxglove SDK for real-time industrial PLC data visualization and playback.

item.title: Visualizing LeRobot (SO-100) using Foxglove
item.description: Visualizing LeRobot (SO-100) using Foxglove

item.title: Unlocking 3D vision in robotics and AI with StereoLabs and Foxglove.
item.description: Unlocking 3D vision in robotics and AI with StereoLabs and Foxglove.

item.title: Converting the LAFAN1 Retargeting dataset to MCAP.
item.description: Converting the LAFAN1 Retargeting dataset to MCAP.

item.title: Announcing: Topic Message Converters.
item.description: Write your own source-controlled scripts for manipulating data.

item.title: Record once, read forever.
item.description: MCAP and the Foxglove SDK.

item.title: Announcing: the Foxglove SDK.
item.description: Streamline your robotics data integration and visualization.

item.title: Announcing Actuate 2025.
item.description: Two days of robotics development insights from the leading technical engineers on autonomy and physical AI.

item.title: Introducing the new Foxglove brand.
item.description: We’ve redesigned the Foxglove brand to better reflect our role as "The observability stack for physical AI."

item.title: Announcing: “custom timestamp field” in the Plot and State Transitions panels.
item.description: Plotting temporal data in Foxglove with flexibility.

item.title: AutoDRIVE RoboRacer Sim Racing League.
item.description: Leveraging Foxglove to visualize race metrics and enforce race regulations for autonomous sim racing.

item.title: ROS 2 composable nodes.
item.description: Optimizing ROS 2 communication: reducing latency with composableNodes.

item.title: Announcing: Custom OIDC configurations.
item.description: Simplify authentication and streamline access control with custom OIDC.

item.title: Spotlight: Técnico Solar Boat is charting the future of sustainable maritime technology.
item.description: Advancing renewable energy and autonomous maritime systems.

item.title: How robots think: processes in a computer.
item.description: Understanding the digital brain in robots.

item.title: Announcing: The Foxglove Academic Plan.
item.description: Empowering the next generation of robotics and embodied AI research.

item.title: Spotlight: How UWA’s REV Lab powers autonomous vehicle technology with Foxglove.
item.description: Leveraging real-time data visualization, fast data extraction, and AI-powered reporting for safer, smarter autonomous vehicle trials.

item.title: Foxglove 2.x vs. Foxglove 1.x.
item.description: Foxglove is the easiest and fastest way to accelerate and scale your robotics and embodied AI development.

item.title: Announcing: Support for H.265, VP9, and AV1 video codecs.
item.description: Foxglove extends video codec support to H.265, VP9, and AV1.

item.title: Technical dive into the Foxglove Isaac Sim extension.
item.description: The Foxglove Isaac Sim extension enables real-time visualization of robotics simulation data directly in Foxglove.

item.title: Converting the WayveScenes101 dataset to MCAP.
item.description: MCAP is an open source container file format for multimodal log data.

item.title: Spotlight: The next generation of autonomous race cars.
item.description: Monash Motorsport and using Foxglove to develop autonomous concepts.

item.title: Announcing: A lightning-fast Timeline view.
item.description: The Foxglove Timeline is over 100x faster.

item.title: Foxglove vs. RViz.
item.description: How Foxglove compares to RViz, the original visualization tool for ROS.

item.title: Announcing: Local multi-file playback.
item.description: Play multiple .mcap files locally in Foxglove as if they were a single file.

item.title: Announcing: A new and improved, blazing fast State Transitions panel.
item.description: A faster State Transitions panel that uses less memory.
